short caption: Snowy street scene with a building and construction crane at sunset.
medium caption: A gray car with roof racks is parked on a snowy street.  A large, light-colored building with columns stands on the right.  A construction crane is visible in the background against a sunset sky.  Bare trees and a partially visible building are also present.  Patches of snow are visible on the ground and sidewalks. The street appears damp or wet. The scene is lit by the setting sun.
long caption: A snowy street scene at dusk, bathed in the warm glow of the setting sun.  A dark gray SUV with roof racks is parked on the right side of the street, partially covered in snow.  The street is marked with faded white lines and patches of wet asphalt.  A large, light-colored building with numerous columns dominates the right side of the image.  A construction crane is visible in the background against the sunset sky.  Bare, winter trees line the street, and a partially snow-covered sidewalk runs alongside the building.  A partially visible building under construction is visible in the background to the left.  The overall atmosphere is quiet and wintry.
